Apple tree in the boulevard in Bettendorf, Iowa. It is on the west side of 18th Street between Kingsway Drive and Queens Court and is just south of the south entrance to Saint John Vianney Church which is across the street. Access: Private but overhanging.
Falling Fruit access: Private but overhanging.
